name: GPT-4.5
note: 'Orion' — OpenAI's largest non-reasoning model; shipped as a costly research preview, removed from API 2025-07-14 and fully sunset from ChatGPT 2026-06-27.

results.notes: MMLU, English (not translated), 0-shot — Table 16 of OpenAI's official GPT-4.5 System Card (Section 5, Multilingual Performance). GPT-4.5 scored 0.896 vs GPT-4o's 0.887 and o1's 0.923 on the same table.

LMSYS Chatbot Arena Elo for gpt-4.5-preview (ranked #1, tied with Grok-3-Preview-02-24 at 1412; 95% CI +11/-11), per Table 5 of Google DeepMind's Gemma 3 Technical Report — same source/format already used elsewhere in this corpus for Arena Elo rows (e.g. gemini-2-0-pro-experimental).

Arena-Hard-v2.0-Preview, Hard Prompt with Style Control, Gemini-2.5 as judge (the repo's official configuration). gpt-4.5-preview scored 50.0 (95% CI -1.9/+2.0), tied with o3-mini-2025-01-31 and gpt-4.1. Date is the v2.0 benchmark's public release date (exact eval-run date not published); score pulled directly from the maintained leaderboard table in the official LMArena arena-hard-auto repo.

Aider Polyglot benchmark, gpt-4.5-preview, diff edit format, 97.3% well-formed responses, aider v0.75.2.dev, cost $183.18. From the official aider.chat leaderboard (independent third-party coding benchmark), not previously tracked for this model.

verificationNotes: Confirmed release as research preview on 2025-02-27; API deprecation 2025-07-14 and ChatGPT retirement 2026-06-27 both confirmed via OpenAI Help Center / news coverage. Launch pricing $75/$150 per 1M tokens confirmed independently. All 6 benchmark rows confirmed verbatim on the cited Helicone blog post. No changes made.
